---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: [Brief description]"
labels: maintenance
assignees:

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task needed.

## Scope
What parts of the project does this maintenance affect? (e.g., specific files, modules, dependencies)

## Impact
What is the impact of not doing this maintenance? (e.g., technical debt, performance issues, security risks)

## Timeline
Is there a specific timeline or deadline for this maintenance?

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
